Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}You hear many bad things these days, but never fear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}Oh, but I'm not telling you what you should believe or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}After all, I didn't believe it at first, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}I heard Nyx-sama will save our world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}My life's been going downhill and I'm getting tired of it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}At my lowest point, I found out about Nyx-sama and my heart came to life again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}How about it? Will you let Nyx-sama into your heart too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}Oh, but I'm not telling you what you should believe or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}After all, I didn't believe at first, either.[n]{f 1 1}
